silver._max_concurrency_note: Threads running Document Intelligence concurrently (silver.max_concurrency). DI Standard (S0) allows 15 analyze transactions/sec by default (raisable via a support ticket); 10 leaves headroom and also bounds the gpt-4.1 figure-captioning calls made inside extraction. Raise toward 15 only if DI is the bottleneck and no 429s appear. Source: Azure Document Intelligence service-limits (S0 = 15 TPS analyze).

document_intelligence._note: Azure Document Intelligence prebuilt-layout extraction. Endpoint/key are read at runtime from env vars AZURE_DOC_INTELLIGENCE_ENDPOINT / AZURE_DOC_INTELLIGENCE_KEY (add them to the Fabric environment .env resource). When caption_figures is true, cropped figure images are downloaded from DI, saved under Files/<figures_subdir>, and (if a multimodal vision_model and the openai endpoint are available) used to enrich figure captions. min_figure_page_fraction drops decorative figures (logos, header/footer glyphs) whose bounding box is below that share of the page, before captioning/saving/chunking; 0 keeps every figure.
document_intelligence._confidence_note: Plan 02 Source->DI layer. persist_confidence aggregates DI per-word OCR confidence onto each block (conf_min/conf_mean on contract_blocks) and a document-level di_quality (fraction of words read at high confidence, >=0.9) on contract_text, flagged di_quality_flag=low below di_quality_threshold. Both feed the silver code fingerprint, so toggling them re-extracts every contract.

gold._max_concurrency_note: Threads running gpt-4.1 field extraction concurrently (gold.max_concurrency). TOKEN-bound, not request-bound: each call sends a full contract, so tokens-per-minute (TPM) is the ceiling. Deployment gpt-4.1 (Global Standard, UK South) is allocated 750K TPM. 8 keeps momentary in-flight tokens well under 750K even for large contracts, with headroom for retries; the SDK retries 429s automatically. Confirm the prod deployment's TPM in the Foundry portal (Management center > Quota) and adjust if prod differs from dev.
gold._silver_path_tables_note: Gold reads the silver lakehouse by PATH (silver is mounted, not attached), and the silver lakehouse is schema-enabled, so its delta tables live under Tables/dbo/. These keys carry the dbo/ schema prefix the gold path loaders require; the bare silver.* names are the catalog names silver's own attached notebooks use.
gold._evidence_note: Per-field provenance written to the tall contract_field_evidence table: the model's verbatim evidence quote, match_type (is the quote really in the contract), judge_verdict (does value+evidence answer the field question), and a fused categorical trust (high/review/low/unknown). judge_enabled=false skips the LLM judge call (extract + locate only; trust is never 'high'). judge_model defaults to MAIN_MODEL. With the judge on, each contract makes TWO gpt-4.1 calls (extract + judge), so it consumes ~2x the TPM — keep max_concurrency conservative. fuzzy_threshold is the minimum SequenceMatcher ratio for a 'fuzzy' quote match; evidence_max_chars caps the stored quote length. The judge prompt and fuzzy_threshold feed the gold code_hash, so changing them re-extracts all contracts.
gold._structured_output_note: Fields are grouped by extraction strategy (one focused model call per group). Each call uses a strict per-type json_schema response_format so values come back correctly typed (boolean/integer/array/struct). Falls back to a plain json_object call if the deployment rejects json_schema. Feeds the gold code_hash, so toggling it re-extracts all contracts.
gold._type_validation_note: Per-type structural validation (gold/validate.py): each extracted value is checked against its declared type/format (boolean is a bool, integer an int, list parses non-empty, struct_list items carry their keys). The result (valid/invalid/not_applicable) is stored on contract_field_evidence and acts as a hard gate in trust derivation — a structurally invalid value can never be 'high'. Feeds the gold code_hash, so toggling it re-extracts all contracts.
gold._retrieval_note: Per-strategy retrieval (gold/retrieval.py). RAG / retrieve-classify field groups pull the retrieval_top_k most relevant chunks per field question from the existing AI Search index (server-side vectorizer, same embedding model as ingest), filtered to the one contract; a group returning fewer than retrieval_min_chunks hits falls back to full text so recall never regresses. AI Search endpoint/key are read from env (AZURE_SEARCH_ENDPOINT / AZURE_SEARCH_API_KEY); absent => full-text fallback. retrieval_top_k and retrieval_min_chunks feed the gold code_hash (changing them re-extracts all contracts).
gold._confidence_gate_note: Plan 02 Source->DI confidence gate. Each field's evidence quote is located within the silver blocks to read the DI conf_min of its span (evidence_di_confidence) and source page (evidence_page). A span below evidence_di_confidence_threshold, or a document scored di_quality_flag=low, sets source_verified=low which can never be 'high' trust (demoted to review). Feeds the gold code_hash, so changing it re-derives trust for all contracts.
gold._vision_verify_note: Plan 02 Phase 2 targeted vision verification. When vision_verify_enabled and the bronze source files are reachable, escalated fields (fuzzy/not_found match, review/low trust, low DI confidence, or low di_quality) have their source PDF page rendered to an image and re-read by a multimodal model (vision_verify_model, defaults to MAIN_MODEL) to confirm/contradict the value. A confirmed page can restore 'high'; a contradiction sets source_verified=low so the field can never be 'high' (demoted to review). vision_verify_max_chars caps the value text shown to the model. Best-effort: a no-op when disabled, source files absent, or rendering unavailable. Feeds the gold code_hash.
gold._token_budget_note: Caps the summed in-flight token cost across the global gold work queue (gold/scheduler.py), which fans every model call from every contract (extraction -> reduce -> judge) into one pool throttled by tokens, not a fixed thread count. Set below the gpt-4.1 deployment's per-minute token ceiling (750K TPM); 500K leaves headroom for SDK 429 retries. Pure runtime knob — NOT part of the code fingerprint, so tuning it never forces reprocessing. Replaces the now-ignored max_concurrency.

eval._note: Standalone gold quality gate (contract_intelligence.eval.gold_eval). Scores contract_fields against a hand-authored ground truth derived from docs/Contract_Review.docx. Run on demand after prompt/field/model changes — not part of the daily pipeline. truth is keyed by join_key; results append to results_table in the gold lakehouse.

azure_openai._note: Auth is API-key via the openai.OpenAI client against AZURE_OPENAI_ENDPOINT (.../openai/v1) with AZURE_AI_PROJECT_API_KEY. Model deployment names come from MAIN_MODEL/EMBEDDING_MODEL env vars; kept here for reference.

ai_search._note: Endpoint/key read at runtime from env (AZURE_SEARCH_ENDPOINT / AZURE_SEARCH_API_KEY). Single index of clause evidence (one doc per silver chunk) consumed by the Foundry RAG agent. The index name is overridable by env AZURE_SEARCH_INDEX_NAME. The vectorizer uses the embedding deployment (EMBEDDING_MODEL) against AZURE_OPENAI_ENDPOINT for query-time integrated vectorization. Requires azure-search-documents>=11.5.1.
